claim: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) with knowledge bases like Confluence is one of the most classic and valuable AI use cases for business productivity
actionable: Prioritize RAG implementations when building AI assistants; integrate knowledge bases to ground responses in organizational data
source_title: This Slack AI Personal Assistant is Better than a Real Person

claim: AI-powered Slack assistants can invoke custom tools, summarize conversations, search the web, and generate responses - enabling true FAQ automation in team channels
actionable: Use RAG platforms like Runbear to add AI assistants to Slack; configure tools for web search, conversation summarization, and custom API integrations
source_title: This Slack AI Personal Assistant is Better than a Real Person

claim: Data flywheels in AI systems create virtuous cycles where more usage generates more data, better models improve results, and increased adoption produces more data
actionable: Design AI products to collect and leverage usage data; ensure model improvements drive adoption which feeds the flywheel loop
source_title: This Slack AI Personal Assistant is Better than a Real Person
